presets.name: OMK Core Verified
presets.description: Default safe execution loop for general coding, refactor, and debugging work.
presets.purpose: Baseline safety, context, review, and verification loop for everyday OMK work with project-local MCP plus full skills and hooks capability flags.

presets.name: OMK Parallel Orchestrator
presets.description: Maximum parallelism preset for orchestrating multiple subagents with full MCP, skills, and hooks access.
presets.purpose: Maximum parallelism orchestration with all available MCP servers, skills, and hooks enabled for multi-agent coordination.

presets.name: OMK TS Product
presets.description: High-efficiency preset for TypeScript, Next.js, NestJS, React, and product UI/API work.
presets.purpose: Strict TypeScript product loop for React/Next UI, Nest/API boundaries, DTO/domain/persistence separation, and UI verification.

presets.name: OMK Worktree Team
presets.description: Parallel worker-lane preset for isolated Git worktrees and merge-before-verify workflows.
presets.purpose: Coordinate isolated parallel worker lanes with branch snapshots, subagent audit, and merge-ready quality evidence.

presets.name: OMK Release Guard
presets.description: Release and security preset for secret checks, destructive-shell guardrails, and publish evidence.
presets.purpose: Guard release and security work with secret scanning, destructive-shell blocks, audit summaries, checklist evidence, and narrow MCP authority because reference MCP servers are advisory examples, not production-ready trust boundaries.
